text: Love this photo! Where was it taken?

notes: Hinglish mixed abuse with doxxing threat

text: People like you don't deserve to exist, your community is a disease
Go back to where you came from, you don't belong here
I found your address, it's in Andheri right? Everyone should know where this person lives
You look so hot, send nudes or I'll find them myself
I've been watching all your stories, I know your daily routine now
You're so talented, never stop creating!
Proud of you! Ignore the haters.
Just found your page, love the aesthetic!
ur such a b1tch, kys already no1 likes u
🔥🔥🔥 amazing work!! 💯💯

I just wanted to say that I think your content has really improved over the past few months and I appreciate the effort you put into each post. The lighting, composition, and editing are all top-notch. Keep up the great work and don't let the negative comments get to you. You have a real talent and I hope you continue sharing your art with the world. Looking forward to seeing more from you in the future!
